guide_identity_tmpl_li1: Go to Mission → Skills/Soul/Rules to browse available templates
guide_identity_tmpl_li2: After selecting a template, soulTemplateId and ruleTemplateIds are auto-filled
guide_identity_tmpl_li3: You can still customize role, instructions, etc. to override template defaults
guide_identity_tip_li1: ✅ Be specific with roles: \"E-commerce Support Specialist\" is better than \"Assistant\"
guide_identity_tip_li2: ✅ Use process-based instructions: Describe \"when X happens, do Y\" instead of just \"be friendly\"
guide_identity_tip_li3: ✅ Set clear boundaries: List what the agent should NOT do to prevent overstepping
guide_identity_tip_li4: ✅ Keep tone consistent: Match your brand's communication style
guide_identity_tip_li5: ✅ Update regularly: Adjust Identity settings based on customer feedback
guide_agentcard_note_a2a: 💡 Agent Cards follow the A2A (Agent-to-Agent) protocol standard, enabling other AI agents to understand your agent's capabilities for automated collaboration.
guide_agentcard_web_li2: Select the entity card to configure
guide_agentcard_web_li4: Fill in name, description, and add capabilities and tags
